info.name: ServiceHub API
info.description: Complete API collection for ServiceHub backend. Base URL: http://localhost:8000/api/v1

request.description: Register a new USER. user_type: USER | CONTRACTOR | ADMIN
Register a new CONTRACTOR.
Verify OTP after register or forget_password. Requires access_token in header.
Resend OTP to email or phone.
Login with email/phone and password.
Login with Google or Apple. social_type: GOOGLE | APPLE
Step 1 of password reset. Returns access_token + OTP.
Step 3 of password reset. Requires access_token from forget_password flow.
Change password while logged in.
Logout and invalidate session.
Get new access_token using refresh_token.
Get logged-in user profile with all details.
Update profile. Works for both USER and CONTRACTOR. gender: MALE | FEMALE | OTHER
Update CONTRACTOR profile including services, experiences, service_areas.
Create profile for USER type. Only call once after registration.
Create profile for CONTRACTOR type. Only call once after registration.

body.raw:
{
  "first_name": "Ali",
  "last_name": "Khan",
  "address": "456 Oak Ave",
  "city": "Chicago",
  "state": "IL",
  "contact_phone": "+1987654321",
  "gender": "MALE",
  "about": "Professional plumber with 5 years experience",
  "services": [
    "Plumbing",
    "Pipe Fitting",
    "Water Heater"
  ],
  "experiences": [
    {
      "company": "ABC Plumbing Co",
      "job_type": "Full Time",
      "designation": "Senior Plumber",
      "start_year": "2019",
      "end_year": "2023"
    }
  ],
  "service_areas": [
    {
      "location": "New York, NY",
      "latitude": "40.7128",
      "longitude": "-74.0060"
    },
    {
      "location": "Brooklyn, NY",
      "latitude": "40.6782",
      "longitude": "-73.9442"
    }
  ],
  "business_license": "uploads/docs/license.pdf",
  "certifications": [
    "uploads/docs/cert1.pdf",
    "uploads/docs/cert2.pdf"
  ],
  "portfolio_images": [
    "uploads/portfolio/img1.jpg",
    "uploads/portfolio/img2.jpg"
  ],
  "profile_picture": "uploads/profile/contractor.jpg"
}

request.description: Get all users. Admin only.
Delete logged-in user account permanently.
Get user info using refresh_token as query param.
Update Firebase push notification token.
Create a REGULAR job (budget <= 2000). expire_days: 1 | 3 | 5 | 7
Create a LIVE auction job (budget > 2000). Real-time bidding via Socket.IO.
Invite a specific contractor. Job appears in their Pending tab as 'Request Service'.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Plumbing Maintenance",
  "description": "Monthly plumbing maintenance for my office.",
  "min_budget": 300,
  "max_budget": 600,
  "expire_days": 3,
  "timeline": "1 day",
  "location": "New York, NY",
  "invited_contractor_id": "{{contractor_user_id}}"
}

request.description: Get all OPEN jobs. For contractors. Supports filters: search, location, job_type, limit, offset
Filter open jobs by search keyword, location, job_type (REGULAR|LIVE).
Get user's OPEN jobs (waiting for bids). tab: pending | active | completed | cancelled
Get user's active jobs (bid accepted, work in progress).
Get user's completed jobs.
Get user's cancelled jobs.
Get single job detail with bids count and accepted bid info.
Update job details. Only job owner can update.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Updated Kitchen Plumbing Repair",
  "description": "Updated description with more details.",
  "min_budget": 300,
  "max_budget": 900,
  "timeline": "5 days",
  "location": "Brooklyn, NY"
}

request.description: Mark job as completed. Only job owner. Enables review. Chat becomes read-only.
Cancel a job. Cannot cancel completed jobs.
Delete a job permanently. Only job owner.
Place a bid on a job. If bid already exists (PENDING), it gets updated. One bid per contractor per job.
Get all bids for a job. Used for auction members list. Sorted by price asc.
Accept a bid. All other bids auto-rejected. Job status -> CLOSED. Chat room created. final_quote_price and final_timeline_estimate are optional.
Reject a bid with optional reason. Contractor sees reason in Past -> Rejected screen.
Contractor's pending bids (job still OPEN). Also includes Service Request invites.
Contractor's active bids (bid accepted, work in progress).
Contractor's past bids (rejected, completed, or cancelled jobs).
Filter bids by job type. type: REGULAR | LIVE
Give review after job is completed. Only job owner. rating: 1-5. One review per job.
Get review for a specific job.
Get all reviews received by contractor. Supports limit and offset query params.
Get contractor reviews with pagination.
Get single review detail. Only reviewer or contractor can view.

item.name: Get or Create Chat by Job

request.description: Get chat room for an active job. Creates if not exists. Returns chat_allowed: false if job is completed (read-only). Only job owner and accepted contractor can access.
Get chat detail with all messages. Use chat_id from previous response.
Get all notifications for logged-in user.
Mark all notifications as read.
Mark a single notification as read.
Get contractor analytics: Job Success Score (pie chart), Bids Success Rate, Profile Views monthly trend.
Get analytics with weekly period. period: monthly | weekly
Get a presigned S3 URL to upload a single file. Then PUT the file directly to upload_url. Use view_url or file_key in your profile/job/bid. folder is optional. expires_in: 60-3600 seconds.
Get presigned S3 URLs for multiple files at once.
Send help/feedback message. Images can be attached as multipart/form-data.
Get all feedback submissions.
Get privacy policy content. Public endpoint.
Create/update privacy policy. Admin only.
Get terms and conditions content. Public endpoint.
Create/update terms and conditions. Admin only.
Get about app content. Public endpoint.
Create/update about app content. Admin only.
Get all reasons (for job cancellation etc). No auth required.
Get all job categories. No auth required.
Get all professions list. No auth required.
Get nested professions by profession_id. No auth required.
